description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, both with textured gray covers and a prominent brown leather strap running vertically across the top book and down the sides. The top book features a woven fabric-like appearance, while the bottom book has a slightly darker, smoother cover. The brown strap is wide and appears to be made of leather, secured with two metallic fasteners on the spine side. The pages are visible from the sides, showing a clean, off-white color. The books are tightly bound, and the overall form is rectangular with sharp, well-defined edges. No visible illustrations or text are present on the covers or spines.
description: Two stacked hardcover books with gray textured covers and a wide brown leather strap running vertically across them. The books have clean, off-white pages and metallic fasteners on the spine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered pages of both books and the brown strap crossing the top book.
description_view_1: Spine view highlighting the brown leather strap and two metallic fasteners on the top book's spine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the page edges and the brown strap.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full width of the books and the brown strap running down the center.
attribute_spine_design: The spine of the top book is gray with a brown leather strap running vertically and two metallic fasteners. No text or decorative patterns are visible.
